evals.prompt: 我改了几个 .cpp 文件，想快速编译验证一下 ace_engine 组件，帮我生成编译命令。
evals.expected_output: Generates a build command with --fast-rebuild and --build-target ace_engine after verifying GN files are unchanged.
expectations: The response asks or checks whether BUILD.gn / *.gni files were modified before recommending --fast-rebuild.
The response generates a command including --product-name rk3568 (or the appropriate product).
The response includes --build-target ace_engine for component-only build.
The response includes --ccache and --export-para PYCACHE_ENABLE:true.
The response includes --fast-rebuild (after confirming it is safe).

evals.prompt: 我刚改了一个 BUILD.gn 文件，加了新的 source，现在要编译 ace_engine 验证。给我编译命令。
evals.expected_output: Recognizes BUILD.gn change and generates a full build command WITHOUT --fast-rebuild.
expectations: The response explicitly warns that --fast-rebuild must NOT be used when BUILD.gn is modified.
The response generates a standard build command without --fast-rebuild.
The response explains why: BUILD.gn changes require gn gen to regenerate ninja files, --fast-rebuild skips this and produces stale output.
The response includes --build-target ace_engine to limit scope.

evals.prompt: 我要跑 ace_engine_test 的单测，帮我生成编译命令，要带覆盖率。
evals.expected_output: Generates ace_engine_test build with coverage flag. NEVER skips coverage for test builds.
expectations: The response includes --build-target ace_engine_test.
The response includes --gn-args ace_engine_feature_enable_coverage=true (mandatory for test builds).
The response uses the simple target name 'ace_engine_test', NOT a GN path format like '//path:ace_engine_test'.
The response includes --ccache and --product-name.

evals.prompt: 帮我编译 SDK，我要验证一下 API 变更对 SDK 的影响。
evals.expected_output: Generates SDK build command with --product-name ohos-sdk and NO --build-target.
expectations: The response uses --product-name ohos-sdk.
The response does NOT include --build-target (SDK build requires full build, target causes cryptic failures).
The response mentions that SDK output goes to out/sdk/ (NOT out/ohos-sdk/).
The response includes --ccache.

evals.prompt: 我有一个 unittest_targets.txt 文件，里面列了要跑的测试，帮我逐个编译。
evals.expected_output: Describes the test list build workflow: read targets from file, build sequentially with stop-on-error.
expectations: The response describes reading targets from unittest_targets.txt (checks foundation/arkui/ace_engine/ first, then root).
The response builds targets sequentially (one at a time) with stop-on-error behavior.
The response uses --build-target=<target> syntax for each target.
The response mentions disk space management: can delete verified test binaries from exe.unstripped/ but NEVER other artifacts.
The response mentions resuming from the failed target if disk full occurs.

evals.prompt: 我不确定能不能用 --fast-rebuild，帮我检查一下。项目根目录是 /home/user/openharmony。
evals.expected_output: Recommends running check_fast_rebuild.sh to verify, or explains the three-stage safety check.
expectations: The response mentions running scripts/check_fast_rebuild.sh as the recommended approach.
The response describes the three checks: uncommitted GN changes, GN vs ninja timestamp, recent GN modifications.
The response states that if any check fails, standard build must be used.
The response defaults to full build when uncertain.
